reasonSummary: A PassportView cannot be attested as if it were a frozen DocumentAssembly.

problems.title: PassportView is not attestable document output
problems.detail: The requested output remains a live, recomputable PassportView and must not be treated as a frozen attestable DocumentAssembly.
problems.suggestedRemediation: Freeze an appropriate DocumentAssembly or SubmissionAssembly instead.
